Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Video.summary: Have you ever wondered how Ronda Rousey deals with injuries? Hard Knocks fighter Jess Hopkins comes to Sports Condtioning coach Marie Michalski to learn techniques to strengthen her shoulders and improve the muscles in her legs for kicking.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
Video.title: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins

Image.alt: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
After The Fight - Jess Hopkins

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK23 - Episode 5
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK23 - Episode 5

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK23 - Episode 5
Fight Vault - HK23 - Episode 5
Fight Vault - HK23 - Episode 5

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Tyson Haines vs. Cody Puls; Felix "The Cat" Jimenez vs. Steven Arens; Curtis Richard vs. Madison Mejia; Adam Zarrillo vs. Derek Lapierre.

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Sambath Khun at HK49

Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun
Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun

Video.summary: Every sport has it's unique set of injuries - however, fighters deal with injury more often than the average athlete. After every fight a fighter must push themselves to get healthy to be ready to fight again. After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Adam Price
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Adam Price
Video.title: After The Fight - Adam Price

Image.alt: After The Fight - Adam Price
After The Fight - Adam Price
After The Fight - Adam Price

Video.summary: Coach Dan Miller puts his wealth of experience and knowledge into helping fighters train properly and get ready to step into the cage the right way. He considers it a gift to be able to help Jess Elverum's MMA career.

Video.summary: Two epic fights take place at HK48. First, Abbas Faleh takes on Cam MacDonald in an amateur match full of action. Then, UFC hopeful Jesse Arnett defends his HK title vs. American Darrick Minner.
